fullText: grock oh Grock okay all the Elon fanboys are going to hate this but it's not really a great model other than Twitter search ctier Claude all right Claude yes current favorite it is an unbelievable model it's good at everything i just love every interaction I have with it yeah it's definitely an S tier for me miniax miniax yeah no Miniax is a great model i've used it a bit there's just a bunch of fantastic companies in China building incredible models releasing them to the world for free and I can't do anything but give them praise for that probably Btier cuz they're not quite Frontier extra love because they have open- sourced open weighted their models chat GPT it has all the features it's hard to ding it for any one thing but it's also not best in class at any one thing so I'm going to give it a tier llama okay i don't even think that's still relevant i never ever use it d tier mistral mistral started coming out very impressive models they open source a bunch it's just not they're not doing it for me i'm going to go ahead and give it D tier gemini gemini is a great model i I don't use it all that much a workhorse model the prices are great i'm going to give it B tier deepseek uh Deepseek i don't think the current batch of Deep Seek models are all that good i'm going to give it Ctier quen oh of all the open- source Chinese models Quen is my favorite bunch of drama happened at their company so I actually don't think they're going to be releasing many more models if any at all so it's very kind of a sad place to be a tier but the fact that I know we're not going to get any more of them I'm dropping it down to B are there any other models that you've got an opinion on maverick I think it was called two models in the family of Llama 4 they put out the small and the medium the Medium was accused of benchmark maxing by using too many emojis and then they just simply did not release that beast of a model
